posts.text: I high doubt it because of these reasons they have been using the rights of song chunari chunari for more than 20 years. Where was vashi bhagnani up until now ? That tells you one thing that the management is really confident about their ownership of the song’s rights and ofcourse they must have consulted with their legal team and then only went ahead to release the song.
